## Specification

Which spec value is incorrect?

| Field | Current Value | Correct Value | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| | | | |

## Location on Site

Where does this incorrect value appear?

- [ ] Hero section counters
- [ ] Technical specifications table
- [ ] Weight budget chart
- [ ] Roadmap phase details
- [ ] Pitch Deck page
- [ ] Other: ___

## Source / Evidence

Please provide a reference for the correct value (analysis document, test data, calculation, etc.).

## Notes

All spec values live in `lib/data.ts`. Changes should be made there and will propagate to all sections automatically.
